questions.objective_ref: Explain what "prohibited uses" means under the EU AI Act, and connect it to the unacceptable-risk tier from 5.7.
Define social scoring and explain why governments doing it is banned.
Define real-time biometric surveillance and explain the narrow exceptions where it is allowed.
Name the other main practices banned under Article 5, at a beginner's level.
Explain why these uses are banned outright instead of merely regulated, using the harm-prevention pillar from 5.4.
Define real-time biometric surveillance and explain the narrow exceptions where it is allowed.
